text:
APR Affiliated Programs 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: 1 = National Health Plan (NHP-ID) 
2 = State-assigned health plan ID 
3 = Medicaid waiver 
4 = Health home entity 
5 = Other 
Null/missing 

COMMENT: The Department of Health and Human Services rescinded the requirement that health plans obtain a 
national health plan identifier (NHP-ID), effective December 27, 2019. However, historical data 
includes identifiers of this type (i.e., where the value of this variable = “1”).
